title: Contains Duplicate
prompt: Given an integer array `nums`, return `True` if any value appears at least twice in the array, and return `False` if every element is distinct.

examples.output:
True
Explanation: The element 1 appears twice.

False
Explanation: All elements are distinct.

notesForAI.coreIdea: Use a hash set to track seen elements. If an element is already in the set, return True. If the loop completes, return False.
commonBugs: Using nested loops O(n^2) instead of a set
Forgetting that set length comparison (len(set(nums)) < len(nums)) also works but builds the entire set first
